title: Gradient Descent & Backpropagation
summary: The engine that drives all learning. Compute loss, compute gradients via chain rule (backprop), update parameters in the direction that reduces loss. Not the same as autograd implementation — the conceptual level matters for architecture design.

mathematical_core.backprop: Reverse-mode automatic differentiation — compute all gradients in one backward pass

notes: Anoop's stance: autograd internals are engine-level, not needed for architecture innovation. Conceptual understanding of gradient flow IS needed for designing trainable architectures.
